patch.value: pm context --fields: per-row field projection for focus items (GH-156 follow-up to --depth full)

Split from pm-j0vc. --depth full ships in the context-projection PR; --fields row-level projection (project high_level/low_level focus rows to a chosen field subset, like pm list --fields) is deferred as a focused follow-up because it requires reshaping ContextResult focus-row types and markdown rendering. --section already covers section-level customization.

value.author: claude-code-agent
value.text: Implemented pm context --fields (GH-156 follow-up to --depth full). Projects focus rows (high_level/low_level/blocked_fallback/recently_created/unparented) to a chosen field subset for low-token reads. New exported helpers parseContextFocusFields (validate+dedup) + projectContextFocusRows in context.ts; ContextResult.focus_fields echoes the projection; renderContextMarkdown renders projected key:value lines (drops recently-created date prefix). Works across markdown/TOON/JSON + pm_context MCP options.fields. Selectable: id,title,type,status,priority,order,deadline,assignee,tags,updated_at,parent,children_total,children_closed,completion_pct,created_at. Tests in context-command.spec.ts. Docs: COMMANDS.md 'Calendar and Context'.

patch.value: Shipped pm context --fields focus-row projection across markdown/TOON/JSON + pm_context MCP. 100% coverage, docs + contracts updated.
pm context supports per-row field projection like pm list --fields
Added --fields projecting all focus-row sections across markdown/TOON/JSON + pm_context MCP
